ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_guidelines" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size guideline */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group designation for the size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label representing the size in years (e.g., 3 yrs, 5 yrs) */,
  "chest_size" TEXT /* Chest size measurement in cm and inches */,
  "length_size" TEXT /* Length measurement in cm and inches */,
  "fit_description" TEXT /* Description of which children the size is most suitable for */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., regular, slim, plus) */,
  "waist_size" TEXT /* Waist size measurement in cm and inches */,
  "hip_size" TEXT /* Hip size measurement in cm and inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., shirts, pants) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size guideline it corresponds to */,
  "size_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity available for this specific size of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES size_guidelines ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the order (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1 to 5 stars) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product this analytics data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded sales data */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold on this date */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the return */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx) */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
